scripts.build: mkdir -p www && cp index.html *.js style.css www/ && cp -r assets vendor www/
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && (cp GoogleService-Info.plist ios/App/App/GoogleService-Info.plist || true) && npx cap open ios
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && (cp google-services.json android/app/google-services.json || true) && npx cap open android
